label: Axiomshade Lake
description: Axiomshade Lake occupies a rectangular basin cut along Kharion Prismworld’s lattice-aligned fracture lines, its margins terminating in crisp right angles rather than natural curves. The water body functions as a stable optical trap, swallowing the planet’s meridian glare and returning it as a dense, planar shadow that lies across the surface like a second skin. Beneath the darkened sheet, submerged glass shelves descend in stepped terraces, their edges prismatic and sharply jointed, refracting stray radiance into thin, ruler-straight seams. The surrounding vitreous crust is polished by persistent laminar winds into mirror facets that reflect the lake’s umbra into repeating geometric patterns across the shore.
